common.exitAppMessage: Are you sure you want to quit the app?

settings.themeDescription: Switch between khata red light mode and black-white dark mode.
settings.languageDescription: Choose app language for all invoice and transaction screens.
settings.profileDescription: Manage how BoloBill works for your daily billing flow and transaction view.
settings.personalComingSoon: Personal profile mode is coming soon.
settings.personalProfileDescription: Best for individual billing, family shop and simple transaction flow.
settings.businessProfileDescription: Best for GST-ready billing, team usage and larger transaction workflows.

home.title: Transaction Dashboard
home.description: Create invoice transactions fast, review latest PDFs and share with your customers.

invoiceHistory.title: All Transactions
invoiceHistory.description: Search by customer, transaction id or PDF name and apply date filters.
invoiceHistory.emptyDescription: Try a different search text or switch date filter.

invoicePreview.title: Transaction Detail
invoicePreview.downloadInfo: Download action will be wired in API phase.
invoicePreview.shareInfo: Share action will be wired in API phase.

voice.title: Voice Invoice
voice.description: Record transaction details, pause anytime, then generate invoice in one flow.
voice.manualBillingDescription: Use this option when you want to type transaction items instead of voice.
voice.fillManualFields: Please fill item name, quantity and price.
voice.addOneItem: Add at least one item first.
voice.manualSaved: Manual invoice created and saved in current flow.
voice.resetConfirmDescription: This will clear current manual items and input fields.
voice.playbackInfo: Playback action is ready. It will play actual audio once real recorder package is integrated.
voice.deleteConfirmDescription: This will remove it from this device only and it will not be uploaded.
voice.downloadInfo: PDF download will be wired with backend response.
